# Dart Theme Patterns

## Generated Token Class (standalone mode)

```dart
// GENERATED by figma2flutter — DO NOT EDIT
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

abstract final class AppColors {
  static const Color primary500 = Color(0xFF3B82F6);
  static const Color textPrimary = Color(0xFF000000);
}
```

## Existing Token Class (tabechao mode)

tabechao uses `DesignTokens` in `lib/core/theme/design_tokens.dart`.
When `generateTokenFiles: false`, generated widgets reference this class directly.

## ThemeExtension Pattern (advanced)

```dart
class AppColorScheme extends ThemeExtension<AppColorScheme> {
  final Color primary;
  final Color secondary;
  // ...
}
```

## Usage in Widgets

```dart
// Standalone: direct class reference
color: AppColors.primary500,

// ThemeExtension: context-based
final colors = Theme.of(context).extension<AppColorScheme>()!;
color: colors.primary,
```
